summary: JG12 Iteration 21 - Nutrition Calculator Unit Display Bug Fixes VERIFIED. Both bugs fixed: 1) BuildMealModal now shows '1 ud' instead of '60 ud' or '180 ud' for unit foods, 2) MealCard now shows '60g' or '1 ud' instead of just 'g'. Backend: 8/8 tests pass. Frontend: All unit display features working correctly.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend: GET /api/calculator/search?q=manzana returns foods with unidades=true and racion=180
✅ Backend: GET /api/calculator/search?q=aceite returns unit foods (cucharada) with unidades=true and racion=10
✅ Backend: GET /api/calculator/search?q=pollo returns foods with unidades=false and racion=100
✅ Backend: GET /api/calculator/search?q=huevos returns unit foods with unidades=true and racion=60
✅ Backend: GET /api/calculator/search?q=arroz returns gram foods with unidades=false
✅ Backend: POST /api/calculator/macros-efectivos calculates correctly for unit foods
✅ Backend: POST /api/calculator/macros-efectivos calculates correctly for gram foods
✅ Backend: POST /api/diets saves diet with unit food storing cantidad_g correctly
✅ Frontend: BuildMealModal - selecting Manzana mediana shows '1 ud' (not '180 ud')
✅ Frontend: BuildMealModal - pressing + on unit food changes to '2 ud' (internally adds racion grams)
✅ Frontend: BuildMealModal - pressing - goes back to '1 ud' minimum
✅ Frontend: BuildMealModal - non-unit food (pollo) shows '100g' correctly
✅ Frontend: BuildMealModal - temp foods list at bottom shows '1 ud' for unit foods
✅ Frontend: MealCard - after adding food, quantity shows '1 ud' (not just 'g')
✅ Frontend: MealCard - +/- buttons increment by racion for unit foods (1 ud -> 2 ud)
critical_code_review_comments: NutritionPage.jsx: formatFoodQuantity() correctly converts grams to units using qty/racion formula
NutritionPage.jsx: getQuantityIncrement() returns racion for unit foods, category-based increment for gram foods
BuildMealModal.jsx: handleAdjustQuantity() uses racion as step for unit foods, 10g for gram foods
BuildMealModal.jsx: Display correctly shows 'X ud' for unidades=true foods using cantidad_g/racion formula
BuildMealModal.jsx: Food objects stored with cantidad_g, unidades, and racion fields
MealCard.jsx: Uses formatFoodQuantity prop to display '1 ud' or '60g' correctly
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration21_nutrition_units.py - Created test suite for unit display bug fixes (8 tests)
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing foods: Manzana mediana (id=380, racion=180, unidades=true), Aceite oliva cucharada (id=3, racion=10, unidades=true), Carne picada pollo (id=117, racion=100, unidades=false)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 21 verified unit display bug fixes in nutrition calculator. Key functions: formatFoodQuantity(food) in NutritionPage.jsx converts cantidad_g to units for display (qty/racion), getQuantityIncrement(food) returns racion for unit foods. BuildMealModal stores cantidad_g (grams) internally but displays as units. MealCard receives formatFoodQuantity as prop. Unit foods in DB have unidades=true and racion>0. Test with: Manzana mediana (id=380, racion=180), Aceite oliva (id=3, racion=10), Huevos cocidos (racion=60). Non-unit foods have unidades=false and racion=100.

bugs_verified_fixed.description: Unit foods showed '60 ud' or '180 ud' instead of '1 ud' in BuildMealModal
bugs_verified_fixed.fix: Display now converts grams to units: qty_display = cantidad_g / racion

bugs_verified_fixed.description: MealCard showed just 'g' without number for quantity
bugs_verified_fixed.fix: MealCard now uses formatFoodQuantity(food) which returns '1 ud' or '60g'
